arts.sum: The team sheets for this evening's 2024/25 UEFA Nations League duel between Germany and Bosnia & Herzegovina have been released.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid, Barcelona 'suffer major blow' in Joshua Kimmich pursuit
arts.sum: Joshua Kimmich, who has been strongly linked with Barcelona and Real Madrid, is reportedly set to sign a new contract at Bayern Munich.

arts.ttl: Confirmed Lineups: Germany U21s vs. Bulgaria U21s
arts.sum: The team sheets for this evening's 2025 UEFA U21 European Championship qualification duel in Regensburg have been released.

arts.ttl: Toni Kroos dramatically changes mind about Celtic as 'second raters' not the team he fell in love with
arts.sum: He slammed Dortmund despite their recent Champions League romp and put the Hoops down the list

arts.ttl: Julian Nagelsmann on Bernd Leno’s rejection of a national team call up: “He made demands that I couldn’t fulfill.”
arts.sum: Speaking at his pre-match press conference (via @iMiaSanMia) ahead of Germany’s game against Bosnia and Herzegovina, Julian Nagelsmann has responded to Bernd Leno’s rejection of the national team. Earlier in…

arts.ttl: Nagelsmann reacts to Klopp's Red Bull job: "I can't imagine there's a clause in his contract"
arts.sum: Julian Nagelsmann has reacted to Jürgen Klopp's new job at Red Bull, expressing doubt over reports that the 57-year-old's contract includes a clause that would allow him to leave the club to become Germany coach.

arts.ttl: Bosnia and Herzegovina clash reunites Germany with Edin Džeko - the 'complete striker' who stunned the Bundesliga with Wolfsburg
arts.sum: Wolfsburg would storm to their first-ever Bundesliga title in 2008/09, winning on the final day from Bayern as an incredibly attacking line-up saw Džeko and Grafite combine for 54 goals, the most famous of which came when they both netted doubles in a 5-1 Matchday 26 win over Bayern. Strike partner Grafite led the way with 11 goals as Wolfsburg achieved their best-ever Bundesliga finish of fifth in Felix Magath ’s first season, and while it was progress, no one could have predicted what would happen next time out.

arts.ttl: Nagelsmann discusses Leno's rejected Germany call-up
arts.sum: At a press conference on Thursday, Germany coach Julian Nagelsmann discussed Bernd Leno's decision to turn down an invitation to join the national team.

arts.ttl: Friday's Transfer Talk Update: Alvaro Fernandez, Matthijs de Ligt, Leroy Sane
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up the latest confirmed transfer news and speculation from across the footballing world.

arts.ttl: Exclusive: A new striker could arrive at Arsenal in 2025 despite Kai Havertz’s form
arts.sum: Kai Havertz has been in top form throughout the opening phase of the 2024/25 campaign for Arsenal but that will not stop the Gunners from signing a new striker in 2025 should they feel they need one. The North London club were in the market for a proper number nine during the latest transfer window […] The post Exclusive: A new striker could arrive at Arsenal in 2025 despite Kai Havertz’s form appeared first on CaughtOffside.
